prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Honda P07A turbocharged 660cc inline-3 (DOHC, 12-valve, MFI)** with a **Garrett GT12 turbo (GT1241Z, 0.35 A/R turbine housing)** for 120+ hp at 7,500 RPM, paired with a **HKS Super SQV IV blow-off valve** and **Toda Racing forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)** to handle boost pressures up to 1.2 bar. Supporting mods include a **Spoon Sports 4-2-1 header** and **Mugen Sports Catalytic Converter** for optimized exhaust flow.

Chassis reinforcement via **Cusco Type-RS 2-point strut tower bar (VAMOS-specific)** and **Spoon Sports rear subframe brace** to eliminate flex under hard acceleration. Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (VAMOS-specific valving, 30-way adjustable damping)** and **Tein EDFC Active Pro for real-time damping control**, paired with **Whiteline 22mm adjustable rear sway bar** to counteract body roll in tight corners.

Drivetrain upgrades including a **K-Tuned 5-speed close-ratio gear set (1st: 3.250, 2nd: 1.944, 3rd: 1.380, 4th: 1.033, 5th: 0.810)** with **OS Giken Super Lock limited-slip differential (1.5-way, 45% preload)** for aggressive launches. Clutch system features a **Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch (6-puck, 1,200 lb-ft torque capacity)** and **ACT ProLite flywheel (4.5 kg)** for rapid rev matching.
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk LB Works VAMOS HOBIO widebody kit** (FRP construction, +80mm front/+100mm rear fender flares) with **custom carbon fiber side skirts** and **rear diffuser** to house a **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (200mm chord, 3D endplates)** for downforce at 80+ mph. Front bumper replaced with **J's Racing Type-II aero bumper (DRL delete, integrated tow hook)** for reduced drag.

Interior stripped and reinforced with **Bride Zeta III (VAMOS-specific mounting brackets)** and **Recaro Pole Position (Kei-car legal, 6-point harness slots)**. Roll cage by **Auto Power Industries (6-point, TIG-welded chromoly, Vamos-specific gusseting)** with **Sparco 6-point harnesses (ASM homologated)**. Dashboard replaced with **Defi BF Advance gauges (oil temp, boost, wideband AFR)** and **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (320mm, suede)**.

Exterior lighting upgraded to **Morimoto XB LED headlights (H4 retrofit, 5,500K)** and **Depo Racing JDM-spec taillights (smoked, sequential turn signals)**. Wheels: **Work Meister S1 3P (14x6 +38, 4x100 PCD)** with **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R (185/55R14, semi-slick compound)** for track use, or **Enkei PF05 (14x6 +45)** with **Federal 595 RS-RR (195/50R14, street compound)** for daily driving. Paint: **PPG Honda Milano Red (R-81M) with 3M Matte Black vinyl wrap accents**.
